title: Donor input row
description: Structural contract for a single raw row from the donor file, checked before any business rule (tier computation, ask math, date logic) runs. This is a schema-validation layer distinct from and prior to the business-rule layer in policy.md: a malformed file fails here, on shape and type, before the system ever reasons about a donor's giving. Enforced by validate_donor_row in scripts/donor_rules.py, called from validate_input.py at the top of the per-row loop.

donor_name.description: Full name. Required; the join key at this fixture scale (see input_schema.md for the CRM-ID recommendation at production scale).

title.description: Honorific exactly as provided. Never inferred; see ADR 0005.

tier.description: Stated tier if the source system has one. Verified, never trusted; see ADR 0002.

gifts.description: Pipe-separated year:amount pairs, for example 2019:500|2021:1200. Required; the source of truth for every derived number.

largest_gift.description: Optional stated value, cross-checked against gifts and never trusted on its own; see ADR 0002.

lifetime_total.description: Optional stated value, cross-checked against gifts and never trusted on its own; see ADR 0002.

last_gift_year.description: Optional stated value, cross-checked against gifts and never trusted on its own; see ADR 0002.
